_comment: EX-09 Versus Monsters — self-contained (supplies packsPerBox). Bandai product description confirms 24 packs x 12 cards per box (packsPerBox was previously 12 — a bug, corrected 2026-07-03 after user caught the same error while adding EX-12). Hit rates below are user-confirmed real-world pull rates, not derived estimates. Pull rates are placeholder pending further verification.

Alt Art._comment: ~2.5 per box — user-confirmed range 2-3/box, midpoint used

Limited Foil._comment: ~1 per box — user-confirmed (older EX sets; EX-12 is 2/box)

Rare Pull._comment: ~1 per 15 boxes — user-confirmed, consistent across all EX sets; $118+ avg
